Bulk Bag Manufacturing · Since 1998

Custom Bags & Corporate Products, Built for Business.

LEGEND INDUSTRIES manufactures custom bags and corporate gifting items in bulk. Full customization, reliable delivery, PAN India supply. We work with businesses, not individual buyers.

View Capabilities Quick Inquiry
Before You Proceed

Is LEGEND INDUSTRIES Right for You?

We focus on bulk manufacturing and corporate supply. Not every inquiry is the right fit — and that's intentional.

You're a good fit if:

  • You need bulk quantities (100+ units)
  • You require custom branding or design
  • You represent a company, institution, or distributor
  • You need reliable, repeat supply
  • Your budget aligns with custom manufacturing (typically ₹40k+ orders)

This may not be the right fit if:

  • Looking for 1–10 pieces for personal use
  • Want the cheapest price regardless of quality
  • One-time retail purchase
  • No branding or customization needed
What We Do

Manufacturing That Delivers

Custom bags, corporate gifting, and utility products — all produced in bulk with full branding support.

Custom Manufacturing

Full custom bag production — travel, duffle, laptop, school. Logo to complete design, built for your brand.

Complete Customization

Logo printing, material selection, size adjustments, color matching, custom packaging. Your specs, our execution.

PAN India Delivery

Structured production with 1–3 week timelines. Reliable delivery across India for repeat and bulk orders.

Quality & Reliability

Since 1998, consistent production quality with structured quality checks before every dispatch.

View All Capabilities
How It Works

Simple, Structured Process

No confusion. Share your requirement, we handle the rest.

  1. 01

    Step 01: Share Requirement

    Product type, quantity, branding needs via WhatsApp or email.

  2. 02

    Step 02: Discuss Options

    We review and discuss material, design, and pricing options.

  3. 03

    Step 03: Sample / Approval

    Design or sample approval before production begins.

  4. 04

    Step 04: Production

    Bulk manufacturing with quality checks at every stage.

  5. 05

    Step 05: Delivery

    Dispatched within committed 1–3 week timeline.

View Full Process
Since 1998

25+ Years of Reliable Manufacturing

LEGEND INDUSTRIES has been producing bags and corporate products from Hyderabad since 1998. Our focus has always been on execution quality, reliable timelines, and building long-term business relationships.

Learn More About Us
Common Questions

Frequently Asked

What is the minimum order quantity?
We specialize in bulk orders. Typical minimums start around 100 units, but this varies by product. Contact us with your specific requirements for an accurate quote.
What is the typical production timeline?
Production typically takes 1–3 weeks depending on order size and customization complexity. Delivery timelines are discussed during the order process.
Can you customize products with our company logo?
Yes, customization is our core strength. We offer logo printing, custom sizes, material selection, color combinations, and custom packaging for bulk orders.
Do you supply PAN India?
Yes. Our production facility is in Hyderabad, Telangana, and we deliver to clients across India.
How do I get a quote?
Share your requirement via WhatsApp or email — product type, quantity, and branding needs. We'll respond with options and pricing.

Ready to Discuss Your Requirement?

Share your product needs, quantity, and branding requirements. We respond within business hours.
